docs:
# Empty State
Placeholder for empty lists, search results, or first-run experiences.
## Import
```tsx
import { EmptyState } from "@/components/ui/empty-state";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<EmptyState title="No results yet" description="Try adjusting your filters or create something new." actionLabel="Create item" compact={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **title** (string) — default: `"No results yet"`: Title
- **description** (string) — default: `"Try adjusting your filters or create something new."`: Description
- **actionLabel** (string) — default: `"Create item"`: Action label
- **compact** (boolean): Compact rows
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add empty-state
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/empty-state
```
